# constraints

**Instance Property**

Access constraints for the keychain item, keyed by [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKTokenOperation] values wrapped in [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSNumber] objects.

## Declaration

```swift
var constraints: [NSNumber : Any]? { get set }
```

## Accessing Keychain Item Attributes

- **objectID**: Returns the object ID used for keychain item identification.
- **label**: The user-visible label for the keychain item.

items.description: Returns the object ID used for keychain item identification.
